_comment: Setup: run `npm install` in ./mcp-servers/ before first use.
Set VAULT_PATH and PROJECT_PATH in your shell or in ./mcp-servers/.env (see ./mcp-servers/.env.example). Never commit .env or other secrets.

Env values below use ${env:...} so Cursor passes through your process environment; ensure those variables are set where Cursor is launched, or set real paths in env if your client does not interpolate.
Launched with `npx ts-node --esm` from ./mcp-servers (local imports use .ts extensions; see tsconfig rewriteRelativeImportExtensions).
